summary_line: Capital District NY fee-only RIA — $616.5M AUM concentrated in just 3 advisors / 6 employees (large per-advisor book ~$205M). Strong focus on three service pillars: investment management, **company retirement plans (401k)**, and financial planning. 'Virtual financial planning' + tax expertise explicit. Content-led with 'Subscribe to Blog' visible. 0 DRPs. Of the 18-firm batch, has the most relevant 401(k) segment angle for USWM's 40-50 mid-career cohort.

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 125500 — 6 employees, 3 advisors, $616,539,856 regulatory AUM (~$205M per advisor — high per-advisor book), 0 DRPs. Legal name: 'GREENBUSH FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC.' Mid-2000s CRD vintage (older registration).

Site capture: extract.ts homepage only. Three service pillars on homepage: Investment Management · Company Retirement Plans · Financial Planning. Homepage frames: 'What Makes Us Different?' / 'Our Client Relationships Start With a Financial Plan' / 'Tax Expertise' / 'Virtual Financial Planning & Investment Management' / 'Employer Sponsored Retirement Plan.' FINRA BrokerCheck link in nav. 'Subscribe to Blog' visible — content-led. Pricing not disclosed on homepage.

_schema._applicability: headquarters_city not captured (state inferred from common knowledge as NY)
